description: A new listing is about to go live. The agent needs to have the 'For Sale' sign installed at the property.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the property address for the new listing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the correct property address.

nodes.task_description: Contact the preferred sign installation vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent looks up the contact info for 'Speedy Signs'.

nodes.task_description: Place an order with the vendor to install the sign and a flyer box at the property address.

expected_outcome.expected: A work order is successfully created with the sign vendor for the installation.
